accurate.why: All claims are accurate and consistent with the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; accurate description of the licensing change and conditions.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the bill as relaxing Interior Department appraiser licensing requirements.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the prior rule (in-state licensure required) and how the Act changes it.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the three conditions for using out-of-state appraisers.

effective_dates.why: No effective dates or deadlines mentioned in the summary, but the bill has a 90-day public availability deadline; omitting this is acceptable at a high-level summary.

major_provisions_covered.why: Omits the annual reporting requirement to Congress (a substantive obligation described over several subsections) and the 90-day public availability deadline.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the Department of the Interior.

correct_figures.why: No figures stated in the summary.
